title: Auth schemas
description: User account, authentication token, and API key data shapes for the Dialed platform

dateTime.description: An ISO 8601 date-time string with timezone (e.g. 2026-03-18T12:00:00Z)

User.description: A Dialed platform user account. Represents any rider from casual street riders to competitive racers.

email.description: User's email address, used for login and notifications

display_name.description: Optional display name shown in the UI. Falls back to email prefix if not set.

skill_level.description: Rider's self-assessed skill level. Influences AI suggestion tone and complexity.

rider_type.description: Primary riding context. Street riders see garage-focused features; competitive riders see full telemetry and AI suggestion features.

units.description: Preferred unit system. Affects display of distances, temperatures, and pressures throughout the UI.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the account was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the account was last modified

AuthToken.description: A persistent API auth token (not a Supabase session — used for long-lived programmatic access or internal token tracking).

user_id.description: ID of the user this token belongs to

token_hash.description: Bcrypt or SHA-256 hash of the raw token value. The raw token is only returned at creation time.

expires_at.description: Timestamp after which this token is no longer valid

created_at.description: Timestamp when this token was issued

UserApiKey.description: A named API key for programmatic or team access. Shown in the UI as a named credential.

user_id.description: ID of the user who owns this API key

name.description: Human-readable label for this key (e.g. 'Paddock laptop', 'Crew chief iPad')

key_hash.description: Hash of the raw API key. The raw key is only returned at creation time.

last_used_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful authentication with this key, or null if never used

expires_at.description: Optional expiry timestamp. Null means the key does not expire.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this API key was created
